value.Name: Main Engine Frame
value.Description: Primary structural frame for the turbofan engine assembly. Manufactured from Ti-6Al-4V titanium alloy. Must withstand 45,000 lbf thrust load and temperatures up to 800°C.

value.Name: Drive Shaft Assembly
value.Description: High-speed rotating drive shaft connecting the turbine to the compressor stages. Operating speed range 0-22,000 RPM. Requires dynamic balancing to ISO 1940 G1 grade.

value.Name: Compressor Fan Blade
value.Description: First-stage compressor fan blade with 3D-printed leading edge for improved aerodynamic efficiency. Bird strike certified per FAA AC 33.77-1A. Quantity: 24 blades per stage.

value.Name: High Pressure Turbine Seal
value.Description: Labyrinth-type air seal for the high-pressure turbine stage. Controls leakage between rotor and stator sections at temperatures up to 1,300°C. Replaced every 5,000 flight hours.

value.Name: Main Shaft Bearing Assembly
value.Description: Duplex angular contact ball bearing assembly supporting the main rotor shaft. Design life 20,000 hours. Currently under revision for improved lubrication feed system.

value.Name: Annular Combustion Chamber
value.Description: Full annular combustion liner with 20 dual-orifice fuel injectors. Designed for NOx emissions compliance with ICAO CAEP/8 standards. Inlet pressure ratio 45:1.

value.Name: Hydraulic Pump Assembly
value.Description: Variable displacement axial piston hydraulic pump rated at 3,000 PSI / 48 GPM. Engine-driven via accessory gearbox. Provides hydraulic power for flight control actuators and landing gear.

value.Name: Integrated Drive Generator
value.Description: 90 kVA integrated drive generator (IDG) providing 115/200V 3-phase 400Hz AC power. Constant speed drive mechanism compensates for variable engine RPM. Mean time between overhaul (MTBO): 12,000 hours.

value.Name: Full Authority Digital Engine Controller
value.Description: Dual-channel FADEC system for complete engine management. Controls fuel flow, variable geometry, and monitoring for both ground and flight operations. DO-178C Level A certified software.

value.Name: Engine Inlet Nacelle
value.Description: Superseded engine inlet nacelle with fixed geometry. Replaced by variable geometry design in Version B. Do not use for new production. Spare parts support until 2030.
